name: sentry-satellite-tracker
description: Real-time satellite tracking web application with 3D globe interface

scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.typecheck: cd client && npm run typecheck && cd ../server && npm run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:server:coverage && npm run test:client:coverage
